Settings.audioDiagnosticsDescription: Show relay, RTP, and playback diagnostics in the room sidebar.

Settings.browserProcessingDescription: Browser processing changes apply when Lyre opens or recreates local audio.

Settings.echoCancellationDescription: Ask the browser to reduce speaker feedback in the microphone stream.
Settings.serverNoiseDescription: Server-side denoise runs in the relay path after audio reaches Lyre.
